headline: A Look At IQVIA Holdings (IQV) Valuation After ESOP Linked Shelf Registration For Potential Share Issuance
summary: ESOP linked shelf registration sets the stage for potential share issuance IQVIA Holdings (IQV) has filed a shelf registration for up to US$3.14b of common stock, covering 17,928,369 shares in an Employee Stock Ownership Plan related offering that could shape future equity issuance and dilution considerations. See our latest analysis for IQVIA Holdings. The ESOP linked shelf filing lands after a weak stretch for the share price, with a 7 day share price return of 9.51% and a 90 day share...
